events.label: assistant
events.text: Determination: **fail**. The run has more than 360° of cumulative bends between pull points, which directly violates NEC 358.26 (EMT is limited to the equivalent of four quarter bends / 360° max between pull points). This is a code violation independent of fill calculations — flagged as `installed-defective`/`non-compliant` with medium risk (pulling difficulty, insulation damage risk). Corrective action: add a pull point or re-route to bring the run within the 360° limit before conductors are pulled. Written to `/app/answer.json`.
